title: senna surattensis
intro: Senna surattensis, also known as Bengal senna, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family that is native to tropical Asia and Africa. The plant's leaves and pods contain anthraquinone glycosides, which have medicinal properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senna surattensis include its ability to act as a laxative, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. Senna surattensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, and it can be used to alleviate symptoms of constipation, diarrhea, and other digestive issues.
